name: M5Core2Radio-v1.4
description: M5Stack Core2 OTR Internet Radio with optional SI4713 FM Transmitter
author: Corey Millia / GitHub Copilot
changes: Fixed button regression (wasReleased spurious boot fires replaced with manual isPressed timer)
Removed 5-second I2C diagnostic scan from boot sequence
Long-press BtnA toggles FM/Speaker mode (when SI4713 present)
Long-press BtnB in FM mode toggles AUX input (stops stream, GPIO26 Hi-Z for ext audio source)
Short-press BtnA opens settings, short-press BtnB cycles stations (unchanged)
